title: capsella matura
intro: Capsella bursa-pastoris, also known as shepherd's purse, is a biennial plant that belongs to the Brassicaceae family. It has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating various health issues. The plant's health benefits include reducing blood pressure, alleviating menstrual cramps, and supporting wound healing. Herbal preparations of shepherd's purse can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used in combination with other herbs to enhance their medicinal effects.
